title: Barista

rationales.taskAutomation: Mobile order-ahead has automated the ordering and payment half of the job; drink assembly for standardized recipes is routine but still requires hands-on execution.
rationales.toolMaturity: Mobile ordering apps are commodity technology at major chains, and robotic coffee kiosks are a live if niche product category.
rationales.adoption: Large coffee chains have widely adopted mobile order-ahead as a default channel; robotic barista kiosks remain a minority deployment.
rationales.agenticExposure: Order intake, customization tracking, and queue sequencing form an agent-ownable pipeline; espresso extraction and milk-texture judgment stay manual.

tasksAtRisk: Standard drink recipes for high-volume orders
tasksGrowing: Latte art and specialty drink craftsmanship
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 35-3023, p25-p75 rounded

defenseSkills.skill: Specialty beverage craft and latte-art skill

insight: Mobile order-ahead already handles the ordering conversation, and a handful of robotic kiosks now pull shots too. The craft differentiation, latte art, dialing in espresso, building cafe regulars, is exactly what keeps human baristas ahead of a vending machine.
